description: SSL certificates for website and e-commerce websites
author: Daniel H.
pros: I've been using Digicert for SSL for 6 years and have used CHAT for support on a regular basis. They are quick, helpful,knowledgeable and efficient. They do offer a discounts if you pay for more than a single year up front.
cons: Their certificates are priecy, and you can easily finder more budget friendly options if you shop around. They do have sister companies that are a bit cheaper like GeoTrust & RapidSSL

description: Complementa y gestiona los certificados de seguridad de los sitios y espacios.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Facilidad de uso en adquisicón de certificados de seguridad para sitios web.

review_title: Great turn key managed PKI solution
description: Highly recommended solution, especially if you want to integrate a turn key PKI with an MDM provider.
author: Isaac O.
pros: This is a great turn key way to spin up a PKI without needing to manage or setup your own servers. Digicert Managed PKI integrates with Airwatch and Jamf to allow you to push certificates to macOS, iOS, Android, Windows and ChromeOS devices. These certificates can then in turn be used authenticate clients to HTTPs sites, WiFi or other services.
cons: Many features focus on integrating with active directory, which isn’t always available. There isn’t a way to identify unused certificates. Interface is still clunky from the Symantec days.

author: dania B.
pros: Simple à utiliser, gestion de domaines et de certificats, automatisations API
cons: pas moyen de faire un export de domaines selon des filtres spécifiques

review_title: DigiCert - Best Way to Purchase SSL Certificates
description: As a reseller I frequently need to purchase new or renewed SSL certificates for my clients. The web site allows one to easily locate certificates ready to renew and process the certificate renewal. Typically, I can have a certificate issued in a few minutes of starting the process. If intervention is required the DigiCert staff is readily available, and often they take the initiative to contact me.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Once I learned my way around the DigiCert.com site, and with the help of product support, I've found the site exeptionaly easy to use.
cons: I can't think of any Cons with DigiCert!

description: Great for implementing stronger authentication methods in your environments
author: Patrick W.
pros: Great way to integrate into an MDM and create network Auth from a cert and no longer simple passwords.
cons: Could be more robust with AD or Directory services. Assign certain certs per individual/groups.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Digicert provides our SSL certificates and support for getting them installed properly in our varied environments.
author: Rik T.
pros: Digicert has been amazing in their support and knowledge.
cons: I have had no negative experience with them.
